modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to open certain CV files during reappointment process

full_description_text:  
I was trying to open some Curriculum Vitae files that I uploaded for the Peds reappointment process, but I can't seem to access them. It’s really frustrating because I need those documents for the review. The files don’t start with '%PDF-', which I think is part of the problem. I just want to get everything sorted out so I can move forward with the reappointment.
